projects.name: skills
projects.description: Agent Skills for real engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.
projects.ai_summary: 该项目提供工程师实用的Agent Skills工具集，直接来自作者的.claude目录。采用Shell脚本实现，轻量且易于集成到开发环境。

projects.name: free-claude-code
projects.description: Use claude-code for free in the terminal, VSCode extension or via discord like openclaw
projects.ai_summary: 实现免费使用claude-code的工具，支持终端、VSCode插件和Discord交互。基于Python开发，提供类似openclaw的多平台接入方案。

projects.name: GitNexus
projects.description: GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine - GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph wit a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration
projects.ai_summary: GitNexus是零服务器的代码智能引擎，在浏览器端构建代码知识图谱。采用TypeScript开发，支持GitHub仓库/ZIP文件导入，集成Graph RAG Agent实现交互式代码探索。

projects.name: openclaw
projects.description: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
projects.ai_summary: OpenClaw 是一个跨操作系统和平台的个人 AI 助手。采用 TypeScript 开发，强调灵活性和可扩展性，支持多种使用场景。

projects.name: awesome-codex-skills
projects.description: A curated list of practical Codex skills for automating workflows across the Codex CLI and API.
projects.ai_summary: 该项目整理了实用的 Codex 技能，用于自动化 Codex CLI 和 API 的工作流。基于 Python 实现，提供高效的工作流自动化解决方案。

projects.name: posthog
projects.description: 🦔 PostHog is an all-in-one developer platform for building successful products. We offer product analytics, web analytics, session replay, error tracking, feature flags, experimentation, surveys, data warehouse, a CDP, and an AI product assistant to help debug your code, ship features faster, and keep all your usage and customer data in one stack.
projects.ai_summary: PostHog 是一个全栈开发者平台，集成了产品分析、会话回放、功能标志等多种工具。采用 Python 开发，支持数据仓库和 AI 辅助调试，帮助开发者高效构建和优化产品。

projects.name: cua
projects.description: Open-source infrastructure for Computer-Use Agents. Sandboxes, SDKs, and benchmarks to train and evaluate AI agents that can control full desktops (macOS, Linux, Windows).
projects.ai_summary: CUA 是一个开源基础设施项目，旨在为计算机使用代理（AI agents）提供训练和评估环境，支持 macOS、Linux 和 Windows 全桌面控制。项目包含沙盒环境、SDK 和基准测试工具，采用模块化设计，便于扩展和集成不同 AI 模型。

projects.name: beads
projects.description: Beads - A memory upgrade for your coding agent
projects.ai_summary: Beads 是为编码代理设计的内存增强工具，通过优化内存管理提升 AI 代理的代码生成效率。该项目使用 Go 语言实现，采用轻量级架构，可无缝集成到现有编码代理工作流中。

projects.name: andrej-karpathy-skills
projects.description: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.
projects.ai_summary: 该项目是 Andrej Karpathy 对 LLM 编码常见问题的观察总结，旨在改进 Claude 代码生成行为。以单文件 CLAUDE.md 形式提供，内容精炼实用，可直接应用于提示工程优化。

projects.name: FinceptTerminal
projects.description: FinceptTerminal is a modern finance application offering advanced market analytics, investment research, and economic data tools, designed for interactive exploration and data-driven decision-making in a user-friendly environment.
projects.ai_summary: FinceptTerminal 是一款现代金融应用，提供高级市场分析、投资研究和经济数据工具，旨在以用户友好的环境支持交互式探索和数据驱动决策。该项目基于 Python 构建，结合了数据可视化与实时分析技术，实现高效的金融数据处理与展示。
